property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\User\AppData\Roaming
vm;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Gradle in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.9 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Users\User\scoop\apps\allure\2.32.0 in;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Users\User\scoop\shims;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\User\AppData\Roaming
vm;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;;.

testcase.name: completeTask

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <500>.

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <500>.
